Rule: high-confidence pure general/concept/meta
-> LLM_DIRECT or LLM_SAFE_DIRECT
-> final concept answer
-> no EvidenceBus

-> EvidenceBus
-> AnswerSlots
-> grounded answer

deterministic no-key direct fallback
for prompt_router LLM_DIRECT

runs only after evidence exists;
classifies answer composition mode,
not whether to gather evidence

LIVE_EMPTY not global absence
local SQL not live/current platform
